Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows significant hyperglycemia, elevated creatinine suggesting impaired renal function, and dyslipidemia with high LDL and triglycerides. Globulin is markedly low, which may indicate a calculation or unit error (g/L vs. g/dL) or hypogammaglobulinemia. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation for diabetes, renal dysfunction, and clarification of globulin result.
Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
